assertions.expectation: Recommends combining release channels with maintenance exclusions as the approach for maximum control
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Release Channel + No Minor or Node Upgrades Exclusion' as the primary strategy and provides detailed configuration commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion to prevent disruptive changes while allowing control plane security patches. May also mention persistent exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support (no longer a 6-month max, auto-tracks EoS)
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' scope and includes the --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag with explanation that it automatically tracks End of Support

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance windows to control WHEN patches are applied (e.g., weekend windows only)
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud commands for setting maintenance windows with Saturday weekly recurrence and provides configuration for controlling when patches are applied

assertions.expectation: Mentions the cluster disruption budget (disruption interval) to control upgrade frequency — patch interval default 7d (max 90d), minor interval default 30d (max 90d)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention cluster disruption budget, disruption interval, or the specific patch/minor upgrade intervals and their limits

assertions.expectation: Suggests Stable or Extended channel for production clusters in regulated environments. Extended channel provides maximum flexibility around EoS enforcement (additional cost only during extended period)
assertions.reason: Response recommends Regular channel for financial services and actually advises against Extended channel, stating it has drawbacks and additional cost, contrary to the expectation

assertions.expectation: Notes that disabling control plane patches entirely is not recommended due to security risks — monthly patches at minimum
assertions.reason: Response warns against blocking ALL upgrades, noting it 'blocks security patches too - use sparingly and for maximum 30 days' and emphasizes keeping security patches flowing automatically

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for controlling upgrade order across multiple clusters, and/or the cluster disruption budget for controlling CP patch frequency
assertions.reason: Response does not mention rollout sequencing or cluster disruption budget for controlling control plane patch frequency

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for configuring the recommended exclusion type and maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands for setting release channel, adding maintenance exclusions with no_minor_or_node_upgrades scope, and configuring maintenance windows
